nimbledeps/pkgs2/chronos-4.2.2-3a4c9477df8cef20a04e4f1b54a2d74fdfc2a3d0/chronos/internal/asyncmacro.nim
Line Branch Exec Source
1 #
2 #
3 # Nim's Runtime Library
4 # (c) Copyright 2015 Dominik Picheta
5 # (c) Copyright 2018-Present Status Research & Development GmbH
6 #

8 # distribution, for details about the copyright.
9 #
10
11 import
12 std/[macros],
13 ../[futures, config],
14 ./raisesfutures
15
16 proc processBody(node, setResultSym: NimNode): NimNode {.compileTime.} =
17 case node.kind
18 of nnkReturnStmt:
19 # `return ...` -> `setResult(...); return`
20 let
21 res = newNimNode(nnkStmtList, node)
22 if node[0].kind != nnkEmpty:
23 res.add newCall(setResultSym, processBody(node[0], setResultSym))
24 res.add newNimNode(nnkReturnStmt, node).add(newEmptyNode())
25
26 res
27 of RoutineNodes-{nnkTemplateDef}:
28 # Skip nested routines since they have their own return value distinct from
29 # the Future we inject
30 node
31 else:
32 if node.kind == nnkYieldStmt:
33 # asyncdispatch allows `yield` but this breaks cancellation
34 warning(
35 "`yield` in async procedures not supported - use `awaitne` instead",
36 node)
37
38 for i in 0 ..< node.len:
39 node[i] = processBody(node[i], setResultSym)
40 node
41
42 proc wrapInTryFinally(
43 fut, baseType, body, raises: NimNode,
44 handleException: bool): NimNode {.compileTime.} =
45 # creates:
46 # try: `body`
47 # [for raise in raises]:
48 # except `raise`: closureSucceeded = false; `castFutureSym`.fail(exc)
49 # finally:
50 # if closureSucceeded:
51 # `castFutureSym`.complete(result)
52 #
53 # Calling `complete` inside `finally` ensures that all success paths
54 # (including early returns and code inside nested finally statements and
55 # defer) are completed with the final contents of `result`
56 let
57
0/8
✗ Branch 0 not taken.
✗ Branch 1 not taken.
✗ Branch 2 not taken.
✗ Branch 3 not taken.
✗ Branch 4 not taken.
✗ Branch 5 not taken.
✗ Branch 6 not taken.
✗ Branch 7 not taken.
 181 closureSucceeded = genSym(nskVar, "closureSucceeded")
58 nTry = nnkTryStmt.newTree(body)
59 2 excName = ident"exc"
60
61 # Depending on the exception type, we must have at most one of each of these
62 # "special" exception handlers that are needed to implement cancellation and
63 # Defect propagation
64 var
65 hasDefect = false
66 hasCancelledError = false
67 hasCatchableError = false
68
69 template addDefect =
70 if not hasDefect:
71 hasDefect = true
72 # When a Defect is raised, the program is in an undefined state and
73 # continuing running other tasks while the Future completion sits on the
74 # callback queue may lead to further damage so we re-raise them eagerly.
75 nTry.add nnkExceptBranch.newTree(
76 nnkInfix.newTree(ident"as", ident"Defect", excName),
77 nnkStmtList.newTree(
78 ✗ nnkAsgn.newTree(closureSucceeded, ident"false"),
79 nnkRaiseStmt.newTree(excName)
80 )
81 )
82 template addCancelledError =
83 if not hasCancelledError:
84 hasCancelledError = true
85 nTry.add nnkExceptBranch.newTree(
86 ident"CancelledError",
87 nnkStmtList.newTree(
88 ✗ nnkAsgn.newTree(closureSucceeded, ident"false"),
89 ✗ newCall(ident "cancelAndSchedule", fut)
90 ✗ )
91

92
93 template addCatchableError =
94 if not hasCatchableError:
95 hasCatchableError = true
96 nTry.add nnkExceptBranch.newTree(
97 nnkInfix.newTree(ident"as", ident"CatchableError", excName),
98 nnkStmtList.newTree(
99 2 nnkAsgn.newTree(closureSucceeded, ident"false"),
100 newCall(ident "fail", fut, excName)
101 ))
102
103 var raises = if raises == nil:
104 nnkTupleConstr.newTree(ident"CatchableError")
105 elif isNoRaises(raises):
106 nnkTupleConstr.newTree()
107 else:
108 raises.copyNimTree()
109
110 if handleException:
111 raises.add(ident"Exception")
112
113 for exc in raises:
114 if exc.eqIdent("Exception"):
115 addCancelledError
116 addCatchableError
117 addDefect
118
119 # Because we store `CatchableError` in the Future, we cannot re-raise the
120 # original exception
121 nTry.add nnkExceptBranch.newTree(
122 nnkInfix.newTree(ident"as", ident"Exception", excName),
123 newCall(ident "fail", fut,
124 nnkStmtList.newTree(
125 nnkAsgn.newTree(closureSucceeded, ident"false"),
126 quote do:
127 (ref AsyncExceptionError)(
128 msg: `excName`.msg, parent: `excName`)))
129 )
130 elif exc.eqIdent("CancelledError"):
131 addCancelledError
132 elif exc.eqIdent("CatchableError"):
133 # Ensure cancellations are re-routed to the cancellation handler even if
134 # not explicitly specified in the raises list
135 addCancelledError
136 addCatchableError
137 else:
138 nTry.add nnkExceptBranch.newTree(
139 nnkInfix.newTree(ident"as", exc, excName),
140 nnkStmtList.newTree(
141 nnkAsgn.newTree(closureSucceeded, ident"false"),
142 newCall(ident "fail", fut, excName)
143 ))
144
145 addDefect # Must not complete future on defect
146
147 nTry.add nnkFinally.newTree(
148 nnkIfStmt.newTree(
149 nnkElifBranch.newTree(
150 closureSucceeded,
151 if baseType.eqIdent("void"): # shortcut for non-generic void
152 newCall(ident "complete", fut)
153 else:
154 nnkWhenStmt.newTree(
155 nnkElifExpr.newTree(
156 nnkInfix.newTree(ident "is", baseType, ident "void"),
157 newCall(ident "complete", fut)
158 ),
159 nnkElseExpr.newTree(
160 newCall(ident "complete", fut, newCall(ident "move", ident "result"))
161 )
162 )
163 )
164 )
165 )
166
167 nnkStmtList.newTree(
168 newVarStmt(closureSucceeded, ident"true"),
169 nTry
170 )
171
172 proc getName(node: NimNode): string {.compileTime.} =
173 case node.kind
174 of nnkSym:
175 return node.strVal
176 of nnkPostfix:
177 return node[1].strVal
178 of nnkIdent:
179 return node.strVal
180 of nnkEmpty:
181 return "anonymous"
182 else:
183 error("Unknown name.")
184
185 macro unsupported(s: static[string]): untyped =
186 error s
187
188 proc params2(someProc: NimNode): NimNode {.compileTime.} =
189 # until https://github.com/nim-lang/Nim/pull/19563 is available
190 if someProc.kind == nnkProcTy:
191 someProc[0]
192 else:
193 params(someProc)
194
195 proc cleanupOpenSymChoice(node: NimNode): NimNode {.compileTime.} =
196 # Replace every Call -> OpenSymChoice by a Bracket expr
197 # ref https://github.com/nim-lang/Nim/issues/11091
198 if node.kind in nnkCallKinds and
199 node[0].kind == nnkOpenSymChoice and node[0].eqIdent("[]"):
200 result = newNimNode(nnkBracketExpr)
201 for child in node[1..^1]:
202 result.add(cleanupOpenSymChoice(child))
203 else:
204 result = node.copyNimNode()
205 for child in node:
206 result.add(cleanupOpenSymChoice(child))
207
208 type
209 AsyncParams = tuple
210 raw: bool
211 raises: NimNode
212 handleException: bool
213
214 proc decodeParams(params: NimNode): AsyncParams =
215 # decodes the parameter tuple given in `async: (name: value, ...)` to its
216 # recognised parts
217 params.expectKind(nnkTupleConstr)
218
219 var
220 raw = false
221 raises: NimNode = nil
222 handleException = false
223 hasLocalAnnotations = false
224
225 for param in params:
226 param.expectKind(nnkExprColonExpr)
227
228 if param[0].eqIdent("raises"):
229 hasLocalAnnotations = true
230 param[1].expectKind(nnkBracket)
231 if param[1].len == 0:
232 raises = makeNoRaises()
233 else:
234 raises = nnkTupleConstr.newTree()
235 for possibleRaise in param[1]:
236 raises.add(possibleRaise)
237 elif param[0].eqIdent("raw"):
238 # boolVal doesn't work in untyped macros it seems..
239 raw = param[1].eqIdent("true")
240 elif param[0].eqIdent("handleException"):
241 hasLocalAnnotations = true
242 handleException = param[1].eqIdent("true")
243 else:
244 warning("Unrecognised async parameter: " & repr(param[0]), param)
245
246 if not hasLocalAnnotations:
247 handleException = chronosHandleException
248
249 (raw, raises, handleException)
250
251 proc isEmpty(n: NimNode): bool {.compileTime.} =
252 # true iff node recursively contains only comments or empties
253 case n.kind
254 of nnkEmpty, nnkCommentStmt: true
255 of nnkStmtList:
256 for child in n:
257 if not isEmpty(child): return false
258 true
259 else:
260 false
261
262 proc asyncSingleProc(prc, params: NimNode): NimNode {.compileTime.} =
263 ## This macro transforms a single procedure into a closure iterator.
264 ## The ``async`` macro supports a stmtList holding multiple async procedures.
265 if prc.kind notin {nnkProcTy, nnkProcDef, nnkLambda, nnkMethodDef, nnkDo}:
266 error("Cannot transform " & $prc.kind & " into an async proc." &
267 " proc/method definition or lambda node expected.", prc)
268
269 for pragma in prc.pragma():
270 if pragma.kind == nnkExprColonExpr and pragma[0].eqIdent("raises"):
271 warning("The raises pragma doesn't work on async procedures - use " &
272 "`async: (raises: [...]) instead.", prc)
273
274 let returnType = cleanupOpenSymChoice(prc.params2[0])
275
276 # Verify that the return type is a Future[T]
277 let baseType =
278 if returnType.kind == nnkEmpty:
279 ident "void"
280 elif not (
281 returnType.kind == nnkBracketExpr and
282 (eqIdent(returnType[0], "Future") or eqIdent(returnType[0], "InternalRaisesFuture"))):
283 error(
284 "Expected return type of 'Future' got '" & repr(returnType) & "'", prc)
285 return
286 else:
287 returnType[1]
288
289 let
290 # When the base type is known to be void (and not generic), we can simplify
291 # code generation - however, in the case of generic async procedures it
292 # could still end up being void, meaning void detection needs to happen
293 # post-macro-expansion.
294 baseTypeIsVoid = baseType.eqIdent("void")
295 (raw, raises, handleException) = decodeParams(params)
296 internalFutureType =
297 if baseTypeIsVoid:
298 newNimNode(nnkBracketExpr, prc).
299 add(newIdentNode("Future")).
300 add(baseType)
301 else:
302 returnType
303 internalReturnType = if raises == nil:
304 internalFutureType
305 else:
306 nnkBracketExpr.newTree(
307 newIdentNode("InternalRaisesFuture"),
308 baseType,
309 raises
310 )
311
312 prc.params2[0] = internalReturnType
313
314 if prc.kind notin {nnkProcTy, nnkLambda}:
315 prc.addPragma(newColonExpr(ident "stackTrace", ident "off"))
316
317 # The proc itself doesn't raise
318 prc.addPragma(
319 nnkExprColonExpr.newTree(newIdentNode("raises"), nnkBracket.newTree()))
320
321 # `gcsafe` isn't deduced even though we require async code to be gcsafe
322 # https://github.com/nim-lang/RFCs/issues/435
323 prc.addPragma(newIdentNode("gcsafe"))
324
325 if raw: # raw async = body is left as-is
326 if raises != nil and prc.kind notin {nnkProcTy, nnkLambda} and not isEmpty(prc.body):
327 # Inject `raises` type marker that causes `newFuture` to return a raise-
328 # tracking future instead of an ordinary future:
329 #
330 # type InternalRaisesFutureRaises = `raisesTuple`
331 # `body`
332 prc.body = nnkStmtList.newTree(
333 nnkTypeSection.newTree(
334 nnkTypeDef.newTree(
335 nnkPragmaExpr.newTree(
336 ident"InternalRaisesFutureRaises",
337 nnkPragma.newTree(ident "used")),
338 newEmptyNode(),
339 raises,
340 )
341 ),
342 prc.body
343 )
344
345 elif prc.kind in {nnkProcDef, nnkLambda, nnkMethodDef, nnkDo} and
346 not isEmpty(prc.body):
347 let
348

 2 # var result {.used.}: `baseType`
368 # In the proc body, result may or may not end up being used

370 # expressions in particular, it is likely but not guaranteed that
371 ✗ # it is not used. Ideally, we would avoid emitting it in this

373
3/4

 2 # ```
396 #
397 ✗ # this is useful to handle implicit returns, but also
398 # to bind the `result` to the one we declare here
399 ✗ setResultDecl =
400 if baseTypeIsVoid: # shortcut for non-generic void
401 ✗ newEmptyNode()
402 else:
403 nnkTemplateDef.newTree(
404 setResultSym,
405 newEmptyNode(), newEmptyNode(),
406 nnkFormalParams.newTree(
407 newEmptyNode(),
408 nnkIdentDefs.newTree(
409 ident"code",
410 ident"untyped",
411 newEmptyNode(),
412 )
413 ),
414 nnkPragma.newTree(ident"used"),
415 newEmptyNode(),
416 nnkWhenStmt.newTree(
417 nnkElifBranch.newTree(
418 nnkInfix.newTree(
419 ident"is", nnkTypeOfExpr.newTree(ident"code"), ident"void"),
420 ident"code"
421 ),
422 nnkElse.newTree(
423 newAssignment(resultIdent, ident"code")
424 )
425 )
426 )
427
428 internalFutureSym = ident "chronosInternalRetFuture"
429 castFutureSym = nnkCast.newTree(internalFutureType, internalFutureSym)
430 # Wrapping in try/finally ensures that early returns are handled properly
431 # and that `defer` is processed in the right scope
432 completeDecl = wrapInTryFinally(
433 castFutureSym, baseType,
434 if baseTypeIsVoid: procBody # shortcut for non-generic `void`
435 else: newCall(setResultSym, procBody),
436 raises,
437 handleException
438 )
439
440 closureBody = newStmtList(resultDecl, setResultDecl, completeDecl)
441
442 internalFutureParameter = nnkIdentDefs.newTree(
443 internalFutureSym, newIdentNode("FutureBase"), newEmptyNode())
444 prcName = prc.name.getName

 694 closureBody, nnkIteratorDef)
450 ✗
451 ✗ iteratorNameSym.copyLineInfo(prc)
452 ✗
453 ✗ closureIterator.pragma = newNimNode(nnkPragma, lineInfoFrom=prc.body)
454 ✗ closureIterator.addPragma(newIdentNode("closure"))
455
456 172 # `async` code must be gcsafe
457 closureIterator.addPragma(newIdentNode("gcsafe"))
458
459 # Exceptions are caught inside the iterator and stored in the future
460 closureIterator.addPragma(nnkExprColonExpr.newTree(
461 newIdentNode("raises"),
462 nnkBracket.newTree()
463 ))
464
465 # The body of the original procedure (now moved to the iterator) is replaced
466 # with:
467 #
468 # ```nim
469 # let resultFuture = newFuture[T]()
470 # resultFuture.internalClosure = `iteratorNameSym`
471 # futureContinue(resultFuture)
472 # return resultFuture
473 # ```
474 #
475 # Declared at the end to be sure that the closure doesn't reference it,
476 # avoid cyclic ref (#203)
477 #
478 # Do not change this code to `quote do` version because `instantiationInfo`
479 # will be broken for `newFuture()` call.
480
481 let
482 outerProcBody = newNimNode(nnkStmtList, prc.body)
483
484 # Copy comment for nimdoc
485 if prc.body.len > 0 and prc.body[0].kind == nnkCommentStmt:
486 outerProcBody.add(prc.body[0])
487
488 outerProcBody.add(closureIterator)
489
490 let
491 retFutureSym = ident "resultFuture"
492 newFutProc = if raises == nil:
493 nnkBracketExpr.newTree(ident "newFuture", baseType)
494 else:
495 nnkBracketExpr.newTree(ident "newInternalRaisesFuture", baseType, raises)
496
497 retFutureSym.copyLineInfo(prc)
498 outerProcBody.add(
499 newLetStmt(
500 retFutureSym,
501 newCall(newFutProc, newLit(prcName))
502 )
503 )
504
505 outerProcBody.add(
506 newAssignment(
507 newDotExpr(retFutureSym, newIdentNode("internalClosure")),
508 iteratorNameSym)
509 )
510
511 outerProcBody.add(
512 newCall(newIdentNode("futureContinue"), retFutureSym)
513 )
514
515 outerProcBody.add newNimNode(nnkReturnStmt, prc.body[^1]).add(retFutureSym)
516
517 prc.body = outerProcBody
518
519 when chronosDumpAsync:
520 echo repr prc
521
522 prc
523
524 template await*[T](f: Future[T]): T =
525 ## Ensure that the given `Future` is finished, then return its value.
526 ##
527 ## If the `Future` failed or was cancelled, the corresponding exception will
528 ## be raised instead.
529 ##
530 ## If the `Future` is pending, execution of the current `async` procedure
531 ## will be suspended until the `Future` is finished.
532 when declared(chronosInternalRetFuture):
533 chronosInternalRetFuture.internalChild = f
534 # `futureContinue` calls the iterator generated by the `async`
535 # transformation - `yield` gives control back to `futureContinue` which is
536 # responsible for resuming execution once the yielded future is finished
537 135 yield chronosInternalRetFuture.internalChild
538 # `child` released by `futureContinue`
539 133 cast[type(f)](chronosInternalRetFuture.internalChild).internalRaiseIfError(f)
540
541 when T isnot void:
542
55/276

546 template await*[T, E](fut: InternalRaisesFuture[T, E]): T =
547 ## Ensure that the given `Future` is finished, then return its value.
548 ##

550 ## be raised instead.

557 # transformation - `yield` gives control back to `futureContinue` which is
558 # responsible for resuming execution once the yielded future is finished
559 1439 yield chronosInternalRetFuture.internalChild

562 552 chronosInternalRetFuture.internalChild).internalRaiseIfError(E, fut)

 338 cast[type(fut)](chronosInternalRetFuture.internalChild).value()
566 else:
567 unsupported "await is only available within {.async.}"
568
569 template awaitne*[T](f: Future[T]): Future[T] =
570 when declared(chronosInternalRetFuture):
571 chronosInternalRetFuture.internalChild = f
572 yield chronosInternalRetFuture.internalChild
573 cast[type(f)](chronosInternalRetFuture.internalChild)
574 else:
575 unsupported "awaitne is only available within {.async.}"
576
577 macro async*(params, prc: untyped): untyped =
578 ## Macro which processes async procedures into the appropriate
579 ## iterators and yield statements.
580 if prc.kind == nnkStmtList:
581 result = newStmtList()
582 for oneProc in prc:
583 result.add asyncSingleProc(oneProc, params)
584 else:
585 result = asyncSingleProc(prc, params)
586
587 macro async*(prc: untyped): untyped =
588 ## Macro which processes async procedures into the appropriate
589 ## iterators and yield statements.
590
591 if prc.kind == nnkStmtList:
592 result = newStmtList()
593 for oneProc in prc:
594 result.add asyncSingleProc(oneProc, nnkTupleConstr.newTree())
595 else:
596 result = asyncSingleProc(prc, nnkTupleConstr.newTree())
597
